text: Expose a non-interactive self-documenting INSIGHTS contract that the Personal Finance Owner or AI Agent Host can invoke safely. Evidence [analogous]: LEDGER, INGEST, CLASSIFY, and BUDGET establish the shared source-generated operation, schema, stable-error, and metadata-only diagnostic conventions.
target: Report generation, inspection, listing, restatement, retention management, status, help, and schema operations expose versioned structured input/results, stable errors and exits, compatibility checks before processing, and metadata-only diagnostics.
